Title: Russian Mom
Actors: Kim Do-hee, Ahn Min-Sang, Kang Ye Na
Plot: Yeong-soo, a widower, informs his son Jang-ho, an aspiring chef, of his plans to remarry Olga, a Russian woman. Jang-ho meets the unexpectedly young Olga and, during Yeong-soo's business trip to Russia, develops an unusual bond wi...
